author: jpata
body:
#### PR description:

As a follow up to https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/33024 and as pointed out in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/25090#issuecomment-804434335, it was pointed out that the outdated LumiProducer preventing concurrent lumi processing was not completely disabled. I removed it from the RecoTLR config.

#### PR validation:

The workflow 1000.0 no longer runs the LumiProducer.

FYI @gkrintir @makortel
title: remove LumiProducer from RecoTLR
